flashcards.back:
Rolling: Gradual replacement
Blue-Green: Two environments, instant switch
Canary: Route small % to new version
Recreate: Stop all, then start new

- Two identical environments (Blue & Green)
- Deploy new version to inactive environment
- Test thoroughly
- Switch traffic instantly
- Easy rollback by switching back

Continuous Integration (CI):
- Automated builds
- Automated tests
- Code quality checks

Continuous Deployment (CD):
- Automated deployment
- Release automation
- Environment management

Liveness Probe: Is the app running?
- Returns 200 if alive
- Fails = restart container

Readiness Probe: Ready for traffic?
- Returns 200 when ready
- Fails = remove from load balancer
